channel.title: Cloud Computing on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Cloud Computing on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Google Buys Solar Farm Output
item.description: Google buys entire output of Steel River Energy Center solar project to offset emissions

item.title: New York Bans Data Center Construction
item.description: New York enacts first US ban on data center construction to ensure environmental sustainability

item.title: New York Bans Data Centers
item.description: New York state imposes a one-year moratorium on data center construction over 50 megawatts

item.title: New York Enacts Data Center Moratorium
item.description: New York becomes the first state to enact a data center moratorium, blocking new permits for hyperscale data centers

item.title: New York State Halts Data Center Construction
item.description: New York State halts construction of new data centers due to environmental concerns

item.title: Amazon Employees
item.description: Amazon employees face termination for backing data center limits, citing city law against employment discrimination over political speech.

item.title: Grid Boost
item.description: Data centers get a fast lane to the grid, but will it alleviate supply shortages?
